title: Associate Software Engineer
notes: Test application for C, Python, software development, defense systems, and engineering documentation.

title: Embedded Software Engineer
notes: Test application for embedded C, microcontrollers, hardware troubleshooting, and defense systems.

title: Systems Integration Engineer
notes: Test application for systems integration, avionics, troubleshooting, and Navy aviation electrical experience.

title: Entry Level Software Engineer
notes: Test application for Python, Java, databases, software development, and engineering problem solving.

title: Test Engineer
notes: Test application for hardware testing, troubleshooting, electrical systems, and technical reporting.
